>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - 停车缴费服务（普通服务商）文档索引

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019514964.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019514982.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4020339052.md)
- [开发接入准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019515014.md)

## API 列表
- [提交停车场进件申请](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019557780.md)
- [查询停车场进件申请单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019557794.md)
- [查询停车场进件申请单列表](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019557811.md)
- [撤回停车场进件申请](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019557799.md)
- [同步车辆入场通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019557757.md)
- [同步车辆离场通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019557725.md)
- [同步支付结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019557765.md)
- [同步非临停扩展支付](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4020338487.md)
- [查询停车场信息](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4023070758.md)
- [查询停车费用](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4019557825.md)
